DG-LZ-MON.name: dg-lz-mon-dynamic-group
DG-LZ-MON.description: dynamic group for security functions execution, required for Logging Analytics

PCY-MON-SERVICES.name: pcy-mon-services
PCY-MON-SERVICES.description: Policy to allow usage of Observability services in tenancy.
statements: Allow service operations-insights to use ons-topics in tenancy
Allow service operations-insights to read secret-family in tenancy
Allow service operations-insights to read autonomous-database-family in tenancy where ALL{request.operation='GenerateAutonomousDatabaseWallet'}
Allow service loganalytics to use metrics in tenancy
Allow service loganalytics to read loganalytics-features-family in tenancy
Allow service dpd to read secret-family in tenancy

PCY-MON-DYNAMIC-GROUP.name: pcy-mon-dynamic-group
PCY-MON-DYNAMIC-GROUP.description: Policy to allow the Observability management agent dynamic group to upload metrics and logs.
statements: Allow dynamic-group 'id_lz_common'/'dg-lz-mon-dynamic-group' to use metrics in tenancy
Allow dynamic-group 'id_lz_common'/'dg-lz-mon-dynamic-group' to {LOG_ANALYTICS_LOG_GROUP_UPLOAD_LOGS} in tenancy

PCY-PROD-PROJ1-MON-ADMINISTRATION.name: pcy-prod-proj1-mon-admin
PCY-PROD-PROJ1-MON-ADMINISTRATION.description: Policy to allow monitoring groups to manage Autonomous Database observability resources in the Prod proj1 compartment.
statements: allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-proj1-admin' to manage compartments in compartment cmp-lz-prod-proj1
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-proj1-admin' to manage dbmgmt-private-endpoints in compartment cmp-lz-prod-proj1
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-proj1-admin' to manage dbmgmt-family in compartment cmp-lz-prod-proj1
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-proj1-admin' to manage ons-topics in compartment cmp-lz-prod-proj1
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-proj1-admin' to manage opsi-family in compartment cmp-lz-prod-proj1
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-proj1-admin' to manage management-dashboard-family in compartment cmp-lz-prod-proj1
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-proj1-admin' to manage management-agents in compartment cmp-lz-prod-proj1
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-proj1-admin' to manage management-agent-install-keys in compartment cmp-lz-prod-proj1
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-proj1-admin' to manage loganalytics-features-family in compartment cmp-lz-prod-proj1
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-proj1-admin' to manage loganalytics-ingesttime-rule in compartment cmp-lz-prod-proj1
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-proj1-admin' to manage loganalytics-resources-family in compartment cmp-lz-prod-proj1
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-proj1-admin' to manage management-dashboard in compartment cmp-lz-prod-proj1
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-proj1-admin' to manage management-saved-search in compartment cmp-lz-prod-proj1

PCY-PREPROD-PROJ1-MON-ADMINISTRATION.description: Policy to allow monitoring groups to manage Autonomous Database observability resources in the Preprod proj1 compartment.

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-preprod-proj1-admin' to manage opsi-family in compartment cmp-lz-preprod-proj1
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-preprod-proj1-admin' to manage management-dashboard-family in compartment cmp-lz-preprod-proj1
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-preprod-proj1-admin' to manage management-agents in compartment cmp-lz-preprod-proj1
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-preprod-proj1-admin' to manage management-agent-install-keys in compartment cmp-lz-preprod-proj1
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-preprod-proj1-admin' to manage loganalytics-features-family in compartment cmp-lz-preprod-proj1
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-preprod-proj1-admin' to manage loganalytics-ingesttime-rule in compartment cmp-lz-preprod-proj1
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-preprod-proj1-admin' to manage loganalytics-resources-family in compartment cmp-lz-preprod-proj1
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-preprod-proj1-admin' to manage management-dashboard in compartment cmp-lz-preprod-proj1
